generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwinSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors collecting operational data from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmission
]

instance SensorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinSensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data from Physical Twin sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, MonitoringEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design (CAD) representations of physical components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, ValidationProcess
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations describing dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, ValidationProcess
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Non-linear least squares solver for model parameter calibration using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationBasedPrediction
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring algorithms using models and sensor data for safety and performance checks"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms processing sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetection
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithms using models and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimation
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for control parameter calculation"
    DTDFVocab:enables Optimization
]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory control algorithms for system management"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControl
]

instance ValidationProcess : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Experimental validation comparing simulated outcomes with physical data"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationBasedPrediction
]

instance SimulationBasedPrediction : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of physical twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveSimulationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight
]

instance FaultDetection : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms identifying system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight, AutomaticCorrectiveAction
]

instance StateEstimation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithms determining current system state"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance Optimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for system control parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control actions for system management"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomaticCorrectiveAction, ManualInterventionAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecast of Physical Twin behavior under current operating conditions"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected system safety violation"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly or fault identified in system"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the system"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal control parameters derived for system performance"
]

instance AutomaticCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment to Physical Twin upon fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ManualInterventionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human operator intervention for system adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Changes to the Physical Twin may be made when violations are detected, as decided by humans or algorithms. However, specific details on command types, control message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture includes a controller, low-level driver, and RabbitMQ communication server for data delivery and synchronization, where calibration algorithms update model parameters using sensor data and monitors validate system performance for safety and optimality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained via calibration algorithms updating parameters with best estimates from sensor data, while validity is ensured through continuous monitoring of system performance against safety and optimality thresholds; detected violations trigger corrective actions by humans or algorithms."
]
